scripts.boot: pnpm install && playwright install && node ./scripts/model-schema generate && pnpm list --depth -1 --recursive --json > workspace-packages.json && node ./scripts/workspace.js fix-package-list
scripts.dev: npm run compile && kill-port 4000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development next dev -p 4000
scripts.start-test-app: npm run compile && cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_PROFILES=test node ./scripts/local-services start && kill-port 4800 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_PROFILES=test next dev -p 4800
scripts.test-full: node ./scripts/delete build/test && npm run compile && kill-port 4800 && cross-env START_APP=true APP_PROFILES=test COLLECT_COVERAGE=true playwright test
scripts.clean: node ./scripts/delete build tsconfig.tsbuildinfo workspace-cache-key.txt && pnpm --filter pkg-* run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=development APP_PROFILES=test node ./scripts/local-services reset
